mapper.select: SELECT id, device_serial AS deviceSerial, channel_no AS channelNo, name, line_y AS lineY, roi, ref_width AS refWidth, ref_height AS refHeight FROM locations WHERE id = #{locationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO locations (device_serial, channel_no, name, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{deviceSerial}, #{channelNo}, #{name}, TRUE, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE locations SET line_y = COALESCE(#{lineY}, line_y), roi = COALESCE(#{roi}, roi) WHERE id = #{locationId}
